content.cn_text: 雅思听力版本 5 4165
content.en_text: IELTS Listening Version 5 4165

content.cn_text: 你将听到几段不同的录音，并需要根据所听内容回答问题。
content.en_text: You will hear a number of different recordings, and you will have to answer questions on what

content.cn_text: 你所听到的内容。
content.en_text: you hear.

content.cn_text: 你会有时间阅读说明和题目，也会有机会
content.en_text: There will be time for you to read the instructions and questions, and you will have a chance to

content.cn_text: 检查你的答案。
content.en_text: check your work.

content.cn_text: 所有录音只播放一遍。
content.en_text: All the recordings will be played once only.

content.cn_text: 考试分为四个部分。
content.en_text: The test is in four sections.

content.cn_text: 请将所有答案写在听力题册上。
content.en_text: Write all your answers in the listening question booklet.

content.cn_text: 考试结束时，你将有十分钟时间把答案誊写到
content.en_text: At the end of the test, you will be given ten minutes to transfer your answers to an

content.cn_text: 答题卡上。
content.en_text: answer sheet.

content.cn_text: 现在请翻到题册第2页第一部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section one on page two of your question booklet.

content.cn_text: 第一部分。
content.en_text: Section one.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一位女士在电话中和一名汽车销售员谈论一些二手车。
content.en_text: You will hear a woman talking on the phone to a car salesman about some second hand cars

content.cn_text: 这些车是他正在出售的。
content.en_text: he has for sale.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间浏览第2页第1至第5题。
content.en_text: First you have some time to look at questions one to five on page two.

content.cn_text: 你会看到已经为你完成了一个例题。
content.en_text: You will see that there is an example that has been done for you.

content.cn_text: 只有这一次，与例题相关的对话会先播放。
content.en_text: On this occasion only, the conversation relating to this will be played first.

content.cn_text: Woman：你好，我在广播里听到你们促销的广告，我想
content.en_text: Woman: Hello, I heard your advert on the radio about the sale you're having, and I wanted to

content.cn_text: 了解一下你们的车。
content.en_text: find out about your cars.

content.cn_text: Salesman：那你打对地方了。你想花多少钱？
content.en_text: Salesman: Well you've called the right place, so how much do you want to spend?

content.cn_text: Woman：我想花大约4000美元，但绝对不超过4300美元。
content.en_text: Woman: I'd like to spend about $4,000, but definitely no more than $4,300.

content.cn_text: 这位女士愿意花费的最高金额是4300美元，所以空格中已经写入
content.en_text: The maximum the woman would like to spend is $4,300, so $4,300 has been written in the
space.

content.cn_text: 现在正式开始。
content.en_text: Now we shall begin.

content.cn_text: 你需要边听边答题，因为录音不会
content.en_text: You should answer the questions as you listen because you will not hear the recording

content.cn_text: 播放第二遍。
content.en_text: a second time.

content.cn_text: 请仔细听，并回答第1至第5题。
content.en_text: Listen carefully and answer questions one to five.

content.cn_text: Woman：你好，我在广播里听到你们促销的广告，我想
content.en_text: Woman: Hello, I heard your advert on the radio about the sale you're having and I wanted to

content.cn_text: 了解一下你们的车。
content.en_text: find out about your cars.

content.cn_text: Salesman：那你打对地方了。你想花多少钱？
content.en_text: Salesman: Well you've called the right place, so how much do you want to spend?

content.cn_text: Woman：我想花大约4000美元，但绝对不超过4300美元。
content.en_text: Woman: I'd like to spend about $4,000, but definitely no more than $4,300.

content.cn_text: Salesman：好的，这个价位我们有一些不错的车。我这里有一辆很好的 Noda。
content.en_text: Salesman: Okay, for that price we've got some nice cars, I've got a lovely Noda.

content.cn_text: 你知道这个车型吗？
content.en_text: Do you know that model?

content.cn_text: Woman：知道，它是什么颜色？
content.en_text: Woman: Yes, what color is it?

content.cn_text: 我知道这听起来不重要，但有些颜色我不想要。
content.en_text: I know it sounds unimportant, but there are certain colours I don't want.

content.cn_text: Salesman：这辆是银色的。
content.en_text: Salesman: Well this one is silver.

content.cn_text: Woman：那很好，因为我不想要黑色这种深色，夏天车里会太热，
content.en_text: Woman: That's good, because I don't want a dark colour like black, as they get too hot in summer,

content.cn_text: 所以它车况好吗？
content.en_text: so is it in good condition?

content.cn_text: Salesman：它刚装了一个最先进的音响，虽然有一盏车灯坏了，但如果你决定买，
content.en_text: Salesman: It's just had a state of the art stereo put in, and although one light is damaged, we'd

content.cn_text: 我们会帮你修好。
content.en_text: repair that for you if you decided to buy it.

content.cn_text: Woman：哦，那你们真不错。
content.en_text: Woman: Oh, that's good of you.

content.cn_text: Salesman：我还有一辆 Comina，是白色的。
content.en_text: Salesman: I've also got a Comina, it's a white one.

content.cn_text: 它比 Noda 稍微贵一点，但车不错。
content.en_text: It's slightly more expensive than the Noda, but it's a good car.

content.cn_text: 我很了解这辆车，因为它以前属于我们这里的经理，所以我以前经常开它。
content.en_text: I know it quite well because it was owned by our manager here, so I used to get to drive

content.cn_text: 开过不少次。
content.en_text: it quite a bit.

content.cn_text: Woman：Comina 还可以，但有点偏大。
content.en_text: Woman: The Comina is okay, but it's a little on the big side.

content.cn_text: Salesman：那 Telsta 怎么样？
content.en_text: Salesman: Well, how about a Telsta?

content.cn_text: 它们更小一些，但也不会太小。
content.en_text: They're smaller, but not too small.

content.cn_text: 我们有一辆橙色的。
content.en_text: We've got an orange one of those.

content.cn_text: 其实，你想要什么类型的车型？
content.en_text: Actually, what kind of model were you after?

content.cn_text: 这辆是自动挡。
content.en_text: This one's an automatic.

content.cn_text: Woman：太好了。
content.en_text: Woman: Great.

content.cn_text: 自动挡比手动挡好开多了，虽然我两种都可以。
content.en_text: They are so much easier to drive than the manual model, although I'm fine with either.

content.cn_text: Salesman：还有一个优点是，前车主上个月刚换了轮胎。
content.en_text: Salesman: And another good feature is that the previous owner only replaced its tyres last month.

content.cn_text: Woman：那能省一些钱，而且和车轮有关的东西对安全很重要。
content.en_text: Woman: That will save some money, and anything to do with the wheels is so important for safety.

content.cn_text: 这辆值得看看。
content.en_text: It might be worth a look.

content.cn_text: Salesman：好的。
content.en_text: Salesman: Okay.

content.cn_text: 现在我们看看你的价位范围内还有什么车。
content.en_text: Now, let's look at what else we've got in your price range.

content.cn_text: Abrada 怎么样？
content.en_text: How about an Abrada?

content.cn_text: 它是红色的。
content.en_text: It's a red one.

content.cn_text: 它是你这个预算范围内正在出售的车里最新的一辆。
content.en_text: It's the newest of the cars for sale in your bracket.

content.cn_text: Woman：它用了多久？
content.en_text: Woman: How old is it?

content.cn_text: 我觉得我可能买不起车龄少于十年的车。
content.en_text: I doubt I could afford anything less than ten years old.

content.cn_text: Salesman：嗯，你可能会惊讶。
content.en_text: Salesman: Well, you might be surprised.

content.cn_text: 它之前只有一任车主，而且那位车主用了八年。
content.en_text: There was only one previous owner, and they had it eight years.

content.cn_text: 其他车至少都有九年车龄。
content.en_text: All the others are at least nine years old.

content.cn_text: Woman：嗯。
content.en_text: Woman: Hmm.

content.cn_text: 那倒是有可能。
content.en_text: Now, that's a possibility.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余对话之前，你有一些时间浏览第6题
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions six

content.cn_text: 到第10题，位于第2页。
content.en_text: to ten on page two.

content.cn_text: 现在请听录音，并回答第6至第10题。
content.en_text: Now, listen, and answer questions six to ten.

content.cn_text: Woman：好的。
content.en_text: Woman: Okay.

content.cn_text: 我对其中几辆车挺感兴趣。
content.en_text: Well, I'm interested in a couple of those.

content.cn_text: 我可以过去看看吗？
content.en_text: Could I come and take a look at them?

content.cn_text: Salesman：当然。
content.en_text: Salesman: Sure.

content.cn_text: 我们一周七天都营业。
content.en_text: We're open seven days a week.

content.cn_text: 你知道我们在哪里吗？
content.en_text: Do you know where we are?

content.cn_text: Woman：我想我知道。
content.en_text: Woman: I think so.

content.cn_text: 你们在 Mitchell 的 Station Road，对吗？
content.en_text: You're on Station Road in Mitchell, right?

content.cn_text: 我坐公交时通常会经过你们那里。
content.en_text: I usually go past your place when I'm on the bus.

content.cn_text: Salesman：没错。
content.en_text: Salesman: That's right.

content.cn_text: 你肯定能找到我们。
content.en_text: You can't miss us.

content.cn_text: 哪一天适合你？
content.en_text: What day would suit you?

content.cn_text: 别拖太久，因为这些车以这个价格很可能很快就卖掉。
content.en_text: Don't leave it too long as these cars are likely to go quickly at these prices.

content.cn_text: Woman：嗯，我星期三之前到不了，而且星期三可能也有点赶。
content.en_text: Woman: Well, I couldn't get there before Wednesday, and even that might be pushing it.

content.cn_text: 星期四怎么样？
content.en_text: How does Thursday sound?

content.cn_text: Salesman：可以。
content.en_text: Salesman: Sounds good.

content.cn_text: 我通常那天和星期五不工作，但这周我上班。
content.en_text: I usually don't work then or Fridays, but I am this week.

content.cn_text: Woman：那很好。
content.en_text: Woman: That's good.

content.cn_text: 我更想和你对接。
content.en_text: I'd prefer to deal with you.

content.cn_text: Woman: 好的，那上午九点半可以吗？
content.en_text: Woman: Okay, so would nine thirty in the morning be okay?

content.cn_text: Salesman: 没问题。
content.en_text: Salesman: No worries.

content.cn_text: 你到的时候，找 Gerald Smith。
content.en_text: When you arrive, ask for Gerald Smith.

content.cn_text: 拼写是 G-E-R-A-L-D。
content.en_text: That's G-E-R-A-L-D.

content.cn_text: Woman：好的。
content.en_text: Woman: Okay.

content.cn_text: Salesman：那么，你会开车来还是坐公共交通来？
content.en_text: Salesman: Now, will you be coming by car or public transport?

content.cn_text: Woman：我可能会坐我爸爸的车来。
content.en_text: Woman: I'll probably come with my dad in his car.

content.cn_text: 他很懂这类事情。
content.en_text: He knows all about this sort of thing.

content.cn_text: Salesman：那你应该可以把车停在超市那里。
content.en_text: Salesman: Well, you should be able to park at the supermarket.

content.cn_text: 这附近商铺很多，停车可能有点困难，
content.en_text: Parking can be a bit hard with all the businesses around here

content.cn_text: 而且我们门前也停满了车。
content.en_text: and all our cars out the front.

content.cn_text: Woman：太好了。
content.en_text: Woman: Great.

content.cn_text: 那么，我需要带什么东西吗？
content.en_text: Now, is there anything I need to bring with me?

content.cn_text: Salesman：我想想。
content.en_text: Salesman: Let me think.

content.cn_text: 如果你想试驾，
content.en_text: If you want to take the car for a test drive,

content.cn_text: 你需要随身带上身份证明。
content.en_text: you'll need to have identification with you.

content.cn_text: 我的意思是，否则你可能直接把车开走再也不回来。
content.en_text: I mean, otherwise you could just drive off and never come back.

content.cn_text: Woman：好的。
content.en_text: Woman: Okay.

content.cn_text: 这很简单。
content.en_text: That's easy.

content.cn_text: Salesman：很好。
content.en_text: Salesman: Perfect.

content.cn_text: 那这周晚些时候见。
content.en_text: See you later this week.

content.cn_text: 第一部分到此结束。
content.en_text: That is the end of section one.

content.cn_text: 你现在有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: You now have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 现在请翻到第3页第二部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section two on page three.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Question 1–10

items.title: One 1. ________ is broken
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问 Noda 有一个什么坏了，原文说 one light is damaged，所以答案是 light。stereo 是新装的，不是坏的部件。

items.title: Used to belong to the 2. ________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问 Comina used to belong to the ______，原文说 owned by our manager，所以答案是 manager。

items.title: It’s an 3. ________ model
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题问 Telsta 是什么 model，原文说 this one's an automatic，所以答案是 automatic。manual 是对比信息。

items.title: Has got new 4. ________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第4题问 Telsta has got new ______，原文说 replaced its tyres last month，所以答案是 tyres。美式拼写也可写 tires。

items.title: Only 5. ________ years old
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问 Abrada 只有多少年车龄，原文说 previous owner had it eight years，所以答案是 8。ten 和 nine 都是干扰。

items.title: Garage address: 6. ________ Road, Mitchell
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问 garage address: ______ Road, Mitchell，原文说 Station Road in Mitchell，所以答案是 Station。

items.title: Day/Time: on 7. ________ at 9:30am
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问 day/time，时间是 9:30am，日期原文确定为 Thursday。Wednesday 和 Fridays 都是干扰。

items.title: Ask for: 8. ________ Smith
items.analysis: 答案解析：第8题问 ask for ______ Smith，原文说 ask for Gerald Smith，并拼写 G-E-R-A-L-D，所以答案是 Gerald。

items.title: Parking available: outside the 9. ________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问 parking available outside the ______，原文说 park at the supermarket，所以答案是 supermarket。

items.title: What to bring: 10. ________ (for a test drive)
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问 test drive 需要带什么，原文说 need to have identification with you，所以答案是 identification。

groups.source_collect:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Second-hand Cars
Cars Available
Noda (silver)
• One $1$ is broken
Comina (white)
• Used to belong to the $2$
Telsta (orange)
• It’s an $3$ model
• Has got new $4$
Abrada (red)
• Only $5$ years old
Other Information
• Garage address: $6$ Road, Mitchell
• Day/Time: on $7$ at 9:30am
• Ask for: $8$ Smith
• Parking available: outside the $9$
• What to bring: $10$ (for a test drive)

source_label: 🍠@Listening 永不虾滑 · 仅供个人学习
source_credit: 此内容由🍠@Listening 永不虾滑整理，仅作为分享供个人使用；禁止商用、倒卖和引流。有问题请先仔细看🍠这个账号的置顶和分享贴。没有团队，不是机构，纯个人分享。督学和其他相关课程请咨询主页另一个号@心情有点虾滑（不回任何机经相关消息）。
